case_name: Ingenieria del Agua y Medio Ambiente Personnel Outsourcing Sector Mismatch
notes: S.C. named environmental engineering but contracts are 'Servicios Especializados de Personal' (labor outsourcing). Tiny activity 2015-2020 (~6M), then 2021 jumps to 31M, peaks 2025 at 148M. 100pct LP single-bid at FIRA, FEFA, NAFIN, port authorities, CIATEJ, CIMAT. Post-2021 outsourcing-reform disguised-name pattern. P5. Sector mismatch ambiente->labor leasing.
vendor_name: Ingenieria del Agua y Medio Ambiente, S.C.

case_name: Supervision Tecnica del Norte IMP Vehicle Leasing Capture
notes: Vehicle leasing firm. 5 contracts at IMP (Instituto Mexicano del Petroleo) total 272M. 2021 LP single-bid 32M then 2025 LP single-bid 239M (7.5x escalation). 60pct DA at IMP (small renewals 90-152k). All other 56 contracts diversified across IMT (87.5pct DA), port authorities, CFE etc. P6 capture at IMP for vehicle leasing.
vendor_name: SUPERVISION TECNICA DEL NORTE SA DE CV
